Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Westbound Reroute near Chicago/Laramie
ShortDescription: Westbound 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Laramie, Augusta, Central and Chicago: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Laramie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Laramie, Augusta, Central and Chicago: due to, street blockage near Chicago/Laramie.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #20 Madison Temporary Reroute near Madison/Campbell

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
